/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/benchmark_logging_interface.dir/test/benchmark/benchmark_logging_interface.cpp.o -o benchmark_logging_interface  -Wl,-rpath,/root/ros2_ws/build/rcl_logging_spdlog:/root/ros2_ws/install/rcl_logging_interface/lib:/root/ros2_ws/install/rcpputils/lib:/opt/ros/humble/lib /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbenchmark_main.so.1.5.3 /opt/ros/humble/lib/libperformance_test_fixture.so librcl_logging_spdlog.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbenchmark.so.1.5.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a /opt/ros/humble/lib/libmemory_tools.so /root/ros2_ws/install/rcl_logging_interface/lib/librcl_logging_interface.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/root/ros2_ws/install/rcpputils/lib
